description: User examines the Flight Centre homepage as banners rotate from 'UK & Europe Sale' to 'Qantas Flights Sale'.
The 'Travel dates' calendar modal opens, displaying February and March 2026.
A promotional pop-up for 'World360' rewards appears, obstructing the calendar view.
User hovers over and clicks the 'X' button to dismiss the promotional pop-up.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top right of the red ad and the ad disappears in the next frame.
